channel.title: How to manage multilingual wordpress
channel.description:
Hello,
Currently, we are on wordpress and planning to use Frontity but How to manage a multilingual website with Frontity?
Is there any plugin/solution for this?

item.title: How to manage multilingual wordpress
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @pratyu.somani

Welcome to the community.

There are some threads in the community forum regarding this:

Multi-language website with frontity 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Hello! I’m facing the same problem here. I’m trying to make a test site (testing up frontity ) and I want to add multilanguage. I’m using WPML plugin and I setted up /es/ for spanish and /en/ for english. The problem is the homepage is resolving a 404. Posts and other pages are showing correctly. Also my localhost domain without the /es or /en is giving an error: Internal Server Error TypeError: Cannot read property 'split' of undefined …

First try with WPML Wordpress site 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Hi, I am a new user of Frontity. I just try for the first time but my web site is multilingual. So, I made a fresh install and just set my Wordpress home in the settings. It seems impossible to have a home page. Other pages in the menu ar displayed but never the home page. Do you have some tips for me ? Other Wordpress install with WPML ? Thanks in advance for your help, David

There’s no a Frontity package ro deal with with this

I think the solution here is using a WPML plugin in the WP and then accesing the proper content by language by using the proper REST API endpoint
You could mix this w/ some translations that may be only in the Frontity app

Hope this helps

Read full topic
